sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Allogene Therapeutics to Announce Interim Futility Analysis Data from its Pivotal Phase 2 ALPHA3 Trial with Cemacabtagene Ansegedleucel (Cema-Cel) in First-Line Consolidation LBCL on Monday, April 13, 2026
feed.summary: Allogene Therapeutics, Inc. announced it will host a conference call and webcast on Monday, April 13, 2026, to review interim futility analysis data from its pivotal Phase 2 ALPHA3 trial. This trial evaluates cemacabtagene ansegedleucel (cema-cel) in first-line consolidation large B-cell lymphoma (LBCL). The company, a clinical-stage biotechnology firm, specializes in developing allogeneic CAR T products for cancer and autoimmune diseases.

feed.title: 5 Best Software Penny Stocks to Buy Now
feed.summary: This article lists the top 5 best software penny stocks to consider buying now, with an extended list available. It highlights Yext Inc. (NYSE: YEXT) as one of the key players, discussing its recent financial performance, analyst ratings, and strategic positioning in the agentic marketing space. The content also features an unrelated promotional section about an AI investment opportunity.

feed.title: Alpha Modus Announces Share Exchange Amid Nasdaq Compliance Effort
feed.summary: Alpha Modus Holdings (AMOD) is exchanging 3,870,000 Series C preferred shares for over 109 million Class A common shares with CEO William Alessi's family trust. This equity restructuring aims to boost the company’s market value and reduce its stockholders’ deficit. The move comes as a response to an April 6, 2026 Nasdaq notice indicating that Alpha Modus no longer meets minimum listing standards.

feed.title: Live Nation antitrust trial nears end as lawyer for 34 states labels the concerts giant a monopolist
feed.summary: The antitrust trial against Live Nation Entertainment and Ticketmaster is nearing its end, with a lawyer for 34 states arguing that the company monopolizes the concert industry and inflates prices. Live Nation's lawyer countered, stating that the company's success is due to hard work and that the market is more competitive than ever. Jurors are expected to begin deliberations soon after closing arguments concluded.

feed.title: Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ) Shares Down 3.6% - Should You Sell?
feed.summary: Verizon Communications (NYSE: VZ) shares dropped 3.6% during Friday's trading, closing at $46.0550 with lower-than-average volume, despite recent positive momentum. The article highlights positive catalysts such as bullish options flow, analyst upgrades, and a dividend increase, alongside risks like a DBS downgrade, governance issues with activists, and notable insider selling. MarketBeat maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $50.56, but advises considering other top-rated stocks.

feed.title: Alpha Modus enters share exchange with CEO trust and receives Nasdaq delisting notice
feed.summary: Alpha Modus Holdings, Inc. has announced an exchange agreement with its CEO's family trust, converting preferred stock into common stock to increase market value and reduce stockholder deficit. Concurrently, the company received a Nasdaq delisting notice for failing to meet minimum financial standards, giving them 45 days to submit a compliance plan. This news follows recent developments including a new patent for real-time personalized marketing and the appointment of a Head of Delivery for its financial services subsidiary.

feed.title: Zhibao Technology Raises Up to $6.67 Million via Senior Secured Convertible Notes
feed.summary: Zhibao Technology Inc. secured up to $6.67 million through a private placement of senior secured convertible notes, with an initial $3.33 million tranche closing on April 10, 2026. These one-year notes bear 7% interest and convert into Class A shares at $0.87 per share, while imposing anti-dilution provisions and participation rights for the investor. This financing aims to address the company's capital needs but introduces tighter capital-structure constraints and potential equity dilution for existing shareholders.

feed.title: A Look at First Solar Inc (FSLR) After 3.1% Gain -- GF Value $27
feed.summary: First Solar Inc (FSLR) shares rose 3.1% to $203.47, indicating a "Modestly Undervalued" status with a GF Value™ of $270.05, representing a 24.7% upside. The company boasts a strong GF Score™ of 92/100, particularly in Financial Strength and Growth, and its current P/E ratio is 28% below its 5-year median. Despite recent insider selling, the analysis suggests an attractive opportunity for investors due to its undervaluation and strong fundamentals.

feed.title: A Look at Fortive Corp (FTV) After 3.1% Decline -- GF Value $46.
feed.summary: Fortive Corp (FTV) shares recently fell 3.1% to $58.36, indicating it is 25.0% overvalued compared to its GF Value™ of $46.70. The company's P/E ratio of 33.7x is significantly above its historical median, reinforcing the overvaluation. Insider selling activity, with $0.4 million worth of shares sold and no purchases in the last three months, suggests a lack of insider confidence.

feed.title: VeriSign Inc (VRSN) Stock Down 3.7% -- Now Undervalued? GF Score: 92/100
feed.summary: VeriSign Inc (VRSN) shares fell 3.7% to $259.79, indicating a slight undervaluation of 0.4% compared to its GF Value™ of $260.95. Despite a strong GF Score™ of 92/100, driven by excellent profitability and growth, the company displays a weak financial strength (3/10) and significant insider selling totaling $3.0M, all suggesting a cautious approach for investors.

feed.summary: Labcorp Holdings Inc (LH) shares dropped 4.5% on April 10, 2026, closing at $260.93. GuruFocus' GF Value™ indicates the stock is 1.6% undervalued, despite its current P/E ratio being slightly above its historical median. The GF Score™ of 84/100 suggests overall strength, but a bearish trend in insider selling raises a cautionary flag for potential investors.

feed.title: Lennox International Inc (LII) Shares Surge 3.4% -- What GF Scor
feed.summary: Lennox International Inc (LII) shares surged 3.4%, currently trading at $505.31. The stock is considered undervalued by 3.3% according to GuruFocus' GF Value™ estimate of $522.41, despite a 7.0% decline over the past year. LII holds a strong GF Score™ of 92/100, indicating solid potential for long-term returns, though recent insider selling may suggest short-term caution.

feed.title: XWELL (NASDAQ: XWEL) adopts yearly say-on-pay advisory vote plan
feed.summary: XWELL, Inc. has announced its decision to hold advisory stockholder "Say-on-Pay" votes annually, following stockholder preference expressed at their December 18, 2025 Annual Meeting. The board made this determination on April 9, 2026, and plans to re-evaluate the annual frequency after the next advisory vote on the matter, expected at the 2031 Annual General Meeting. This decision was disclosed in an amended 8-K filing to clarify the frequency of these votes on executive compensation.

feed.title: Walmart Inc stock (US9311421039): Is everyday low pricing still the unbeatable edge for U.S. investo
feed.summary: This article examines Walmart's core strategy of "everyday low prices" and its impact on the company's dominance in U.S. retail. It discusses how Walmart's scale, efficiency, and omnichannel approach help it compete against rivals and sustain growth despite economic challenges and rising competition. The piece also highlights Walmart's diverse product mix, expansion into healthcare, and competitive resilience, making it a key stock for U.S. investors seeking exposure to the American consumer economy.

feed.title: Regency Centers Updates Dividend Reinvestment and Stock Purchase Plan
feed.summary: Regency Centers (REG) has updated its Dividend Reinvestment and Stock Purchase Plan by filing a prospectus supplement with the SEC and securing a legal opinion to offer up to 100,000 new common shares. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates REG as Outperform, noting solid financials and a positive earnings outlook, despite concerns about valuation and revenue decline. The company's stock currently has a "Buy" rating from analysts with a $79.00 price target.

feed.title: Alaska Airlines hikes checked bag fees, citing fuel price volatility
feed.summary: Alaska Airlines has increased its checked bag fees due to the volatility of fuel prices. This decision follows similar fee hikes implemented by other major airlines including American, Southwest, United, and Delta. The article notes that the airline industry is responding to rising operational costs, specifically those related to fuel.

feed.title: WidePoint (WYY) files ATM prospectus to raise up to $15.5M via H.C. Wainwright
feed.summary: WidePoint Corporation has filed an At-The-Market (ATM) prospectus to raise up to $15.5 million by offering common stock through H.C. Wainwright & Co., LLC. The sales will occur on the NYSE American or other trading markets, with the Sales Agent receiving a 3% commission. Proceeds from this offering are intended for general corporate purposes, including business expansion and potential acquisitions.

feed.title: PRE 14A] Allarity Therapeutics, Inc. Preliminary Proxy Statement
feed.summary: Allarity Therapeutics, Inc. has filed a preliminary proxy statement (Form PRE 14A) for its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders, scheduled for June 26, 2026. Shareholders will vote on director election, auditor ratification, increasing the 2021 Equity Incentive Plan reserve by 500,000 shares, a non-binding say-on-pay proposal, approval for shares issued under an equity line impacting the Nasdaq 20% Rule, and an amendment to permit officer exculpation which requires a 66-2/3% vote. The document also details the company's executive and director compensation, risk oversight, and related party transactions.

feed.title: Will Procter & Gamble (PG) beat quarterly earnings? Predi...
feed.summary: This Polymarket listing details a prediction market regarding whether Procter & Gamble (PG) will beat its estimated non-GAAP EPS of $1.56 in its upcoming quarterly earnings, expected on April 24, 2026. The market will resolve to "Yes" if PG reports non-GAAP EPS greater than $1.56, primarily using official company documents or SeekingAlpha as a source. Specific rules are outlined for resolution in cases of missing non-GAAP EPS, GAAP EPS usage, late earnings releases, and data restatements.

feed.title: Amprius Technologies (NYSE:AMPX) Trading 6.8% Higher - What's Next?
feed.summary: Amprius Technologies (NYSE:AMPX) shares rose 6.8% on Friday, trading at $17.24 amid significant analyst optimism and raised price targets. The company beat quarterly EPS and revenue expectations, but remains unprofitable with substantial insider selling occurring recently. Despite this, insiders still own a notable portion of the stock, and institutional investors have been adjusting their holdings.

feed.title: International Business Machines (NYSE:IBM) Shares Down 2.7% - Should You Sell?
feed.summary: International Business Machines (NYSE:IBM) shares dropped 2.7% to $230.68 on Friday with above-average volume, influenced by recent analyst target adjustments, institutional rebalancing, and short-term selling. While analyst sentiment is mixed but leans bullish with a "Moderate Buy" consensus and a $309.63 price target, the company's fundamentals remain strong, supported by an EPS and revenue beat, a 2.9% dividend yield, and growth initiatives in AI and quantum computing. Recent insider purchases by Director Michael Miebach and David N. Farr also indicate confidence in the company's future.

feed.title: Will Hasbro (HAS) beat quarterly earnings? Predictions & ...
feed.summary: This article details a Polymarket prediction market concerning whether Hasbro (HAS) will beat its Q1 2026 quarterly earnings. The market will resolve to "Yes" if Hasbro's non-GAAP EPS is greater than $0.99, the current Street consensus estimate. The resolution rules specify primary and secondary sources for EPS figures and conditions for market resolution if earnings are not released or if non-GAAP EPS is unavailable.

feed.title: FedEx pilots reach tentative agreement with company
feed.summary: FedEx pilots, represented by the Air Line Pilots Association (ALPA), have reached a tentative agreement with the company. This deal, which includes a significant pay bump of about 40% in 2026 and subsequent annual increases, still requires review by the FedEx Master Executive Council and a ratification vote by the pilots. This news comes after pilots had expressed frustration over the lack of a new collective bargaining agreement.

feed.title: XP Inc stock (KYG982391099): Is its digital brokerage model strong enough for U.S. investor interest
feed.summary: XP Inc is a leading digital brokerage in Brazil, offering a tech-driven platform that democratizes investing across various asset classes. The company's model taps into Brazil's growing financial literacy and mobile-first user base, providing U.S. investors with exposure to Latin American fintech growth. While offering diversification and resilience, investors should consider risks such as political volatility, competition from neobanks, and the success of international expansion.

feed.title: IBM to pay $17 million to settle discrimination allegations, DOJ says
feed.summary: IBM has agreed to pay $17 million to resolve allegations of discrimination related to its diversity, equity, and inclusion practices, according to the U.S. Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche. This settlement addresses claims that IBM's DEI initiatives constituted illegal discrimination. The Department of Justice announced the agreement following an investigation into the technology company's policies.

feed.title: BlackRock : 2026 Annual Report Proxy Statement (4/10/2026)
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has released its 2026 Annual Report Proxy Statement, detailing strong financial performance in 2025, including a record $698 billion in net inflows and a 10% dividend increase for 2026. The report emphasizes the company's commitment to shareholder value, strategic investments in private markets, and a robust corporate governance framework. Shareholders are invited to the virtual Annual Meeting on May 20, 2026, to vote on director elections, executive compensation, and other proposals.

feed.title: Rosen Law Firm Encourages CleanCore Solutions, Inc. Investors to Inquire About Securities Class Action Investigation – ZONE
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is investigating potential securities claims against CleanCore Solutions, Inc. (NYSE American: ZONE) following allegations of misleading business information. The firm is preparing a class action to recover investor losses and encourages affected shareholders to contact them for more information on how to join the prospective lawsuit.

feed.title: Humana Expands Board, Elects Robert Field as Director
feed.summary: Humana Inc. has announced the expansion of its Board of Directors from ten to eleven members and the election of Robert S. Field as an independent director, effective April 16, 2026. Field, a veteran healthcare investor, brings over two decades of experience in healthcare investing, managed care, and regulatory expertise. His appointment is expected to bolster Humana's growth strategy and reflects the company's commitment to board refreshment and corporate governance.

feed.title: Axon director Matthew McBrady to step down after annual meeting
feed.summary: Axon Enterprise, Inc. announced that director Matthew McBrady will not seek re-election at the 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders and will step down when his term expires. His decision is not due to any disagreement with the company's operations, policies, or practices. This news comes amidst recent analyst evaluations of Axon, highlighting growth prospects, new product offerings, and varying price targets.

feed.title: Tesla's self-driving software gets Dutch go-ahead, in boost for EU ambitions
feed.summary: Tesla's driver assistance software, which handles most driving tasks on highways and city streets under human supervision, has received regulatory approval from the Dutch vehicle authority, marking its first approval in Europe. This decision could facilitate the software's acceptance by other European authorities. The full self-driving software is already available in the U.S.

feed.title: Reverse split consolidates Akanda Corp (AKAN) common shares 1-for-4.5
feed.summary: Akanda Corp. has officially implemented a 1-for-4.5 reverse stock split of its common shares, effective April 13, 2026. This consolidation, documented in Articles of Amendment under Ontario’s Business Corporations Act, reduces the total number of outstanding shares without altering shareholders' proportional ownership. Fractional share entitlements will be rounded down to the nearest whole share.

feed.title: Rosen Law Firm Encourages CleanCore Solutions, Inc. Investors to Inquire About Securities Class Action Investigation – ZONE
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is investigating potential securities claims against CleanCore Solutions, Inc. (NYSE American: ZONE) on behalf of investors who may have suffered losses due to allegedly misleading business information. The firm is preparing a class action lawsuit and encourages affected shareholders to contact them to join the prospective action without out-of-pocket fees. Rosen Law Firm highlights its extensive experience and track record in securities class action litigation.

feed.title: The Coca-Cola Company stock (US1912161007): Is its U.S. consumer dominance now the real test amid shifting habits?
feed.summary: This report examines whether Coca-Cola's iconic brand and distribution network can sustain growth for U.S. investors amid evolving American spending patterns, inflation pressures, and health trends. It breaks down the company's asset-light business model, product diversification, and defensive qualities, highlighting why Wall Street maintains a positive outlook despite some risks. The article advises investors to monitor quarterly earnings, sustainability initiatives, and new product launches to inform their investment decisions.

feed.title: Honeywell (HON) withdraws 2027 and 2028 notes from Nasdaq listing
feed.summary: Honeywell International Inc. has voluntarily withdrawn its 3.500% Senior Notes due 2027 and 2.250% Notes due 2028 from listing and registration on the Nasdaq Stock Market LLC. This action, categorized as neutral in impact and sentiment, adheres to SEC Form 25 regulations. The withdrawal does not alter the notes' interest rates, maturities, or contractual payment obligations.

feed.title: 12 Health Care Stocks Moving In Friday's After-Market Session
feed.summary: This article lists 12 healthcare stocks that experienced significant movement in Friday's after-market trading session. Gainers include Virax Biolabs Group (VRAX), IDEAYA Biosciences (IDYA), Allogene Therapeutics (ALLO), Oncolytics Biotech (ONCY), PureTech Health (PRTC), and PharmaCyte Biotech (PMCB). Losers include Wellgistics Health (WGRX), Nasus Pharma (NSRX), Vivos Therapeutics (VVOS), Estrella Immunopharma (ESLA), Geovax Labs (GOVX), and Profusa (PFSA), with specific percentage changes and market caps provided for each.

feed.title: Zentek Ltd stock (CA98936C1068): Why does its graphene tech matter more for U.S. investors now?
feed.summary: Zentek Ltd, a Canadian company traded over-the-counter in the U.S. (ZENYF), specializes in graphene-based technologies with applications in antimicrobials and air filtration. The article highlights why its innovative solutions, particularly ZenGUARD and Hydrozen, are becoming increasingly relevant for U.S. investors due to growing demand for sustainable tech and addressing public health and environmental concerns. Despite sparse analyst coverage typical for small-cap stocks, Zentek's alignment with U.S. market trends and B2B sales strategy presents a speculative opportunity for those tracking advanced materials innovation.

feed.title: Crestview Partners sells select water solutions (WTTR) shares for $46.8m
feed.summary: Crestview Partners, a major shareholder in Select Water Solutions (NASDAQ:WTTR), sold over 3 million shares for $46.8 million. The transaction occurred as the stock neared its 52-week high after an 83% gain. This sale comes amidst other company news, including a dividend announcement, an analyst upgrade, and a public stock offering.

feed.title: Fastenal declares $0.24 quarterly dividend, payable May 26 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Fastenal Company announced a quarterly dividend of $0.24 per share, payable on May 26, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 28, 2026. This dividend reflects an increase from previous payments and continues the company's track record of dividend payments since 1991. Despite strong stock performance near its 52-week high, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is currently overvalued relative to its Fair Value.

feed.title: Valmont Industries Sees Major Investment from Daugherty Foundation
feed.summary: The Robert B. Daugherty Foundation has acquired a significant stake in Valmont Industries, purchasing 250,000 shares valued at approximately $100.58 million. This investment now represents 100% of the foundation's portfolio, signaling strong institutional confidence in Valmont Industries' long-term growth potential due to its role in infrastructure and agricultural products. Other major investors have also adjusted their holdings, suggesting broad institutional support for the company.

feed.title: More Than 150 Jobs Lost as General Mills Shutters Plant in June
feed.summary: General Mills plans to close its St. Charles County, MO, facility in June, resulting in 163 job losses. The plant, which manufactures pizza crusts, is one of three US-based manufacturing plants the company announced in October 2025 it would close due to increasing supply chain challenges. This closure comes as General Mills faces waning profits, experiencing an 8% decrease in net sales and a 41% drop in operating profit in its fiscal 2026 Q3 results.

feed.title: Exicure Strengthens Leadership With New COO and Director
feed.summary: Exicure (XCUR) has enhanced its leadership with the appointment of Yoontae Han to its board of directors and audit committee, and Dongho Lee as audit chair on April 8, 2026. The company also named Young Seung Ko as Chief Operating Officer on April 9, 2026, leveraging his extensive experience in enterprise software. These appointments are aimed at strengthening the company's governance, audit oversight, and operational capabilities, despite the stock receiving a "Sell" rating from analysts and a "Neutral" score from TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, due to weak financial performance.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare releases 2026 Impact Report
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare has released its 2026 Impact Report, detailing its achievements in 2025 across clinical quality, workforce development, innovation, and community involvement. The report highlights 47 million patient encounters, significant capital investments, and a strong focus on patient-centered care and community support, made possible by its 320,000 colleagues. Key areas of impact include clinical excellence with 44 hospitals recognized by Healthgrades, investments in colleagues' futures, and substantial contributions to community organizations.

feed.title: Alphabet Grants New Long-Term Equity Awards to Executives
feed.summary: Alphabet's board committee has approved substantial equity awards for four top executives, including performance stock units (PSUs) and restricted stock units (GSUs). These awards are designed to link executive compensation more closely to relative total shareholder return compared to S&P 100 peers and ensure retention during the transition from the SVP Bonus program. The compensation structure emphasizes alignment with shareholder outcomes and market performance, with PSUs vesting based on 2026–2028 performance and GSUs vesting monthly through 2028.

feed.title: Apple is closing stores in three states as it begins to pull back on mall locations
feed.summary: Apple is closing three of its mall-based stores in Maryland, California, and Connecticut due to worsening mall conditions and other retailers pulling out. While employees at the non-union stores will be transferred, staff at the unionized Towson Town Center location will need to reapply for positions, leading to accusations of union busting. This move mirrors a broader trend of retailers like Saks Global Inc. adjusting their physical footprints.

feed.title: Engineering roles open as Applied Optoelectronics, Inc. seeks RD team expansion in Atlanta
feed.summary: Applied Optoelectronics, Inc. is actively recruiting engineers in Atlanta to expand its research and development team, focusing on next-generation optical technologies. This expansion follows recent significant orders for 800G transceivers and the company's efforts to integrate optical engines and increase optical power density for AI applications. The move highlights the company's commitment to innovation and regional growth in the optical technology sector.

feed.title: BULGOLD Announces Filing of Fourth Quarter Financial Results for the Three and Twelve Months Ended December 31, 2025
feed.summary: BULGOLD Inc. has filed its audited annual financial statements and MD&A for the year ended December 31, 2025. The company reported a net comprehensive loss of $440,528 ($0.01 per share) and held cash and cash equivalents of $259,530 as of December 31, 2025. BULGOLD is a gold exploration company focused on projects in Central and Eastern Europe.

feed.title: Virax Biolabs Announces Full Exercise of Pre-Funded Warrants From $5 Million Private Placement
feed.summary: Virax Biolabs Group Ltd. announced the full exercise of pre-funded warrants from a $5 million private placement initiated in December 2025. This exercise, completed by April 10, 2026, increased the company's ordinary shares outstanding to 19,923,432, converting the financing into equity. Virax Biolabs is a UK-based life sciences and diagnostics company.

feed.title: ALDX Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Aldeyra Therapeutics, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit Filed by The Rosen Law Firm
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is reminding investors who purchased Aldeyra Therapeutics, Inc. (ALDX) securities between November 3, 2023, and March 16, 2026, of the May 29, 2026, lead plaintiff deadline for a securities fraud lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Aldeyra made misleading statements regarding inconsistent results from clinical trials for its drug candidate, reproxalap. Investors are encouraged to join the class action to potentially seek compensation.

feed.title: TeraWulf Options Spot-On: On April 10th, 206.07K Contracts Were Traded, With 2.07 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: The article reports that on April 10th, 206.07 thousand TeraWulf options contracts were traded. This trading volume is significant compared to the 2.07 million open interest in these options. The high trading activity suggests notable investor interest in TeraWulf options.

feed.title: HPE-Jupiter push self-driving networks to power Korea’s AI infrastructure - CHOSUNBIZ
feed.summary: HPE and Jupiter are collaborating to introduce self-driving networks to enhance Korea's AI infrastructure. This initiative aims to optimize and automate network operations to support the growing demands of artificial intelligence. The partnership seeks to provide advanced networking solutions for the Korean market.
